attributes.description: Microservices log health at a glance. Add panels: 1) Lens Stat - Error count (level:ERROR). 2) Lens Stat - Warning count (level:WARN). 3) Lens Pie - Logs by service (query-microservice vs inventory-microservice). 4) Lens Area - Log volume over time by service. Data view: application-logs*.
attributes.title: Microservices Log Health
